title: Microsoft and Mistral Expand Strategic Partnership
description: According to Microsoft Source and France 24, Microsoft is expanding its partnership with Mistral AI involving a multibillion-dollar deal and GPU spending.

sources.title: Microsoft and Mistral expand strategic partnership to give enterprises and regulated industries frontier AI they can control
Microsoft strikes 'multibillion-dollar' deal with French AI firm Mistral
Microsoft to spend billions on GPUs to be shared with AI lab Mistral

sections.heading: Strategic Partnership Expansion
paragraphs: According to Microsoft Source, Microsoft and Mistral are expanding their strategic partnership. The collaboration aims to provide enterprises and regulated industries with frontier AI capabilities that they can control.

sections.heading: Multibillion-Dollar Agreement
paragraphs: France 24 reports that Microsoft has struck a 'multibillion-dollar' deal with the French AI firm Mistral. This financial commitment highlights the significance of the expanded relationship between the two entities.

sections.heading: Infrastructure and GPU Investment
paragraphs: Data Center Dynamics states that Microsoft plans to spend billions on GPUs. These resources are intended to be shared with the AI lab Mistral to support their operations.

faq.q: What is the goal of the Microsoft and Mistral partnership?
faq.a: According to Microsoft Source, the goal is to give enterprises and regulated industries access to frontier AI they can control.

faq.q: What financial investments are involved in this deal?
faq.a: France 24 reports a 'multibillion-dollar' deal, and Data Center Dynamics notes that Microsoft will spend billions on GPUs to be shared with Mistral.

news_coverage.title: Microsoft and Mistral expand strategic partnership to give enterprises and regulated industries frontier AI they can control
Microsoft strikes 'multibillion-dollar' deal with French AI firm Mistral
Microsoft to spend billions on GPUs to be shared with AI lab Mistral
